title: Busbar connector
abstract: One aspect of the present disclosure is to provide a connector enabling good heat dissipation. A connector 11 according to the one aspect of the present disclosure is provided with a housing 13 made of metal, a flat plate-like busbar 14 to be held in the housing 13, a ceramic member 20 to be interposed between one flat surface 14a of the busbar 14 and a contact portion 19 of the housing 13, and compression coil springs 21 for pressing another flat surface 14b of the busbar 14 toward the contact portion 19.
claims: 1. A connector, comprising: upper and lower housings made of metal; a flat plate-like busbar to be interposed between the upper and lower housings; a ceramic member to be interposed between one flat surface of the busbar and a contact portion of the upper housing; and a compression coil spring supported by the lower housing and configured to press another flat surface of the busbar toward the contact portion.
